channel.title: Matter Firmware Consulting for Enterprise Hardware Teams on Matterize Labs
channel.description: Recent content in Matter Firmware Consulting for Enterprise Hardware Teams on Matterize Labs

item.title: Choosing a Matter Platform by Device Class
item.description: A practical framework for selecting Espressif, Nordic, Silicon Labs, or STMicroelectronics for your next product.

item.title: ESP32 + MLX90393 Magnetic Field Visualizer
item.description: A practical ESP-IDF firmware demo for streaming magnetic field telemetry to a browser dashboard over SoftAP and WebSocket.

item.title: Dendo Retrofit Motorized Blinds Kit
item.description: Retrofit smart blinds kit case study focused on battery-powered installation and smart-home ecosystem integration.

item.title: A Certification Readiness Playbook for Matter Devices
item.description: How firmware teams reduce certification churn with a repeatable validation process.

item.title: Brighter Floor Lamp
item.description: Connected floor lamp case study with Matter ecosystem compatibility messaging and high-output lighting positioning.

item.title: Matter Commissioning Gotchas on Embedded Targets
item.description: Common commissioning failures and how to prevent them across Thread and Wi-Fi products.

item.title: Dendo Smart Control Module (SCM)
item.description: Matter-enabled control module for motorized blinds with dual Thread and Bluetooth support messaging on the public case-study page.
